name: Multi Speaker Dialogue Homogenization Suite
description: Propose a benchmark concept for multi speaker dialogue homogenization suite.
related_rules: Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
related_validators: Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
related_failure_modes: Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.

failure_modes: Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.
